instruction: I am currently utilizing LibreOffice Writer to compose a Linux tutorial, and I intend to display the outcomes generated by executing the "ls" command in /home/user. Kindly execute this command and save the screenshot of the terminal as 'ls.png' on the Desktop.
config: _execute_setup(command="python -c \"import pyautogui; import time; pyautogui.hotkey('f11'); time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.click({SCREEN_WIDTH_HALF}, {SCREEN_HEIGHT_HALF}); time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.scroll(-20)\"")

evaluator.eval: compare_image_text(get_vm_file(env, path='/home/user/Desktop/ls.png'), rules={'type': 'text', 'text': 'ls'}) or compare_image_text(get_vm_file(env, path='/home/user/Desktop/ls.png'), rules={'type': 'text', 'text': '1s'}) or compare_image_text(get_vm_file(env, path='/home/user/Desktop/ls.png'), rules={'type': 'text', 'text': '1s'})
